suggest.marko/database-pgsql: PostgreSQL driver (recommended for new projects — strong JSON, FTS, pgvector support)
suggest.marko/filesystem-local: Local disk filesystem driver (recommended default; zero infrastructure required)
suggest.marko/filesystem-s3: Amazon S3 filesystem driver (for cloud and distributed deployments)
suggest.marko/errors-simple: Simple error handler (recommended for production — minimal information disclosure)
suggest.marko/errors-advanced: Advanced error handler with pretty stack traces and suggestions (recommended for development)
suggest.marko/view-twig: Twig template engine driver (recommended for broader ecosystem familiarity)
suggest.marko/view-latte: Latte template engine driver (compile-time safety, n:attribute syntax)
suggest.marko/cache-file: File-based cache driver (recommended for single-server apps)
suggest.marko/cache-redis: Redis cache driver (recommended for distributed deployments and high-throughput apps)
suggest.marko/cache-array: In-memory cache driver (request-lifetime only; intended for testing and dev environments)
suggest.marko/inertia-react: React frontend driver for Inertia.js (recommended — largest community and tooling ecosystem)
suggest.marko/queue-sync: Synchronous queue driver (recommended for development — runs jobs inline, no infrastructure)
suggest.marko/queue-database: Database-backed queue driver (production-ready; uses your existing database)
suggest.marko/queue-rabbitmq: RabbitMQ queue driver (recommended for high-throughput production deployments)
suggest.marko/pubsub-redis: Redis pub/sub driver (recommended — purpose-built for messaging)
suggest.marko/pubsub-pgsql: PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY pub/sub driver (no additional infrastructure if you already use Postgres)
suggest.marko/media-gd: GD image processor (recommended — ships with most PHP installations)
suggest.marko/media-imagick: ImageMagick image processor (higher fidelity; requires ext-imagick and ImageMagick library installed)
suggest.marko/mail-log: Log-only mailer driver (writes emails to LoggerInterface; intended for development and testing)
suggest.marko/session-file: File-based session driver (recommended default for single-server apps)
suggest.marko/session-database: Database-backed session driver (recommended for distributed deployments and queryable session data)
suggest.marko/translation-file: File-based translation driver (PHP array files per locale)
suggest.marko/database-readwrite: Read/write connection splitting decorator (optional — works alongside a base driver)
suggest.marko/page-cache-entity: Auto-purges page-cache tags on entity save/delete (optional add-on)
